2184470.name: South Pole Bebop
2184470.description:
A turn-based multiplayer strategy game inspired by Into The Breach. Take down your opponent’s bases or characters to win. Strategize, position your squad, and battle both rivals and zombies. Customize your deck to boost your bases and characters. Pick 3 unique heroes, each with special abilities, and show off your strategic skills!

Synopsis

A tranquil village in the South Pole has been overrun by mysterious invaders. But where did they come from? A conspiracy surrounds an AI organization that recently expanded in Antarctica. Could they be behind this? Innocent villagers are transforming into zombies and attacking their fellow residents alongside the intruders. Defend your home and protect Antarctica!

Game modes

  • Multiplayer (PvP): You can be matched with random players of similar skill or invite a friend to join your lobby using a lobby code.

  • Player VS AI: Compete against a powerful AI Bot that adjusts to your skill level.

  • Custom match: Challenge your friends! They can join your lobby using a lobby code.

Introducing a PvPvE (Player vs Player vs Environment) battle. In this setup, both players (or a Player and AI Bot) confront each other as well as the challenging game Environment, symbolized by zombies. Zombies serve as a mutual adversary for both players, neutral and hostile to all parties involved.

Create two unique decks of characters and ability cards before your game. The deck collects information about your win rate with a particular character and card setup. Evaluate your decks and opt for the most potent one. Experiment with different card and character combinations to craft the optimal strategy. Be mindful of your deck selection as it decides the outcome of your game.

Use Relics to enhance your character’s abilities during a game.
2184470.supported_languages: 英语, 韩语, 日语
